scripts.web: mkdir -p fonts && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Ionicons.ttf fonts/Ionicons.ttf && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Feather.ttf fonts/Feather.ttf && expo start --web
scripts.web:build: mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Ionicons.ttf dist/fonts/Ionicons.ttf && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Feather.ttf dist/fonts/Feather.ttf && expo export --platform web && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Ionicons.ttf dist/fonts/Ionicons.ttf && cp node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/Feather.ttf dist/fonts/Feather.ttf
